response.justification: Aisha demonstrates extensive full-stack experience with a strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) and additional relevant languages (Java, Kotlin). Her work includes scaling systems, AI-agent infrastructure, and user-focused applications, with clear ownership of high-impact projects. The resume highlights deep technical expertise, collaboration, and a proactive approach to improving development practices.
strengths: Directly relevant full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven track record in scaling systems and AI-agent infrastructure
Strong collaboration skills and contributions to open-source projects
concerns: Limited evidence of Vitest testing framework experience
No explicit mention of cloud platform (AWS/GCP/Azure) in recent roles
Primary focus on backend/mobile rather than frontend-heavy applications
